title: ManasCore
description: Modding and Core Library by ManasMods
body:
![ManasCore](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ManasCore/BH_MC_Header.png)
Modding and Core Library by ManasMods

This Mod doesn't provide any new functionality for Minecraft itself. It is required by other Mods we create and provides useful utilities for our Mod Development.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ManasCore/BH_MC_Features.png)
- Extended DataGen classes for
  - Block states (and Models)
  - Block Tags
  - Item Models
  - Language Files
  - Recipes
- Easy to use Keybinding class
- Utility Methods to render a scaled text in a fixed area (scales text down until it fits into the are)
- Utility Methods add, change and remove Attribute Modifier
- Utility Methods to check Player Permissions
- Easy to use ItemComparator.Builder class to create a sorting algorithm 
- Inventory Tab API to add new creative inventory like tabs to the survival inventory


Special thanks to BisectHosting for supporting this Project!
[![https://bisecthosting.com/bloodmoon](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/ManasCore/BH_MC_PromoCard.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/bloodmoon)
